samples:
I had to put my hand right into the flames
To feel the heat of our love in motion
And see how bright and hot the center is


My whole life, I thought that we were perfect together
Our connection was so strong and pure
We never could have got this far if there wasn’t one
But now I want it all to come undone 


You took me away from home and tore me apart 
Tried to take control while you pushed me aside
Don't you think I deserve better than this? Don’t you care at all?


This time when you run away, I hope you die a little inside
Leave your armor on while you get ready to leave
Get away without even leaving a trace behind
Yeah, go ahead and do everything you wanna do anyway
Don't point the finger but don't try to explain what happened
It just doesn't make any sense anymore to me


My whole life, I thought that we were perfect together
Our connection was so strong and pure
We never could have got this far if there wasn’t one
But now I want it all to come undone

Get over yourself
Wake up to the sun
Don't you dare mess with me now


You can't scare me
Leave me alone I wanna go home
Let's say goodbye, take your time
Don't cry for a man who is leaving

Yeah, get ready for this mother of all tests
Wake up and climb on board, my love
I don't want to sleep forever so long live rock 'n' roll
Rock 'n' roll's alive in me, yeah

Please understand, wake up to the sun
Don't you dare mess with me now



You can't scare me
Leave me alone I wanna go home
Leave me alone I wanna go home
Leave me alone I wanna go home
Yeah, wake up to the sun
Don't you mess with me now

Awake and ride along to somewhere new and better
Take a deep breath and count to ten
Open wide and swallow, swim across another ocean
Swallow the light before it escapes again

I wish I could reveal the secrets
In my heart, so much, to you


"You're a liar! You don't even try." 
You said this to me one time. Don't forget  
It all started when we met
I was mesmerized by your eyes and smile
We had our little game for a while 
Please don't make me feel like this
Open your mind to reason


You are not alone in this fight
The others say that it will end soon
So open up your mind to reason
Our world is turning upside down
All these times of trouble must come to an end 

Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!

And yet another test comes our way
On our knees, pray to overcome
Don't think twice, just get up, stand tall
Fight hard 'cause there's no other way

You are not alone in this fight
No more reasons why I should hold back now
Rise above yourself again, arise above yourself

Wanna change something? Wanna change everything? 
Why don't you start with yourself?
Get up, face reality. Get off the couch, go outside
See what life has to offer 


"You're a liar! You don't even try!"

You took my innocence
And left me in a maze of sorrow
I'm all alone and broken now
Lost in time, this torture will never end
Your love was my escape from reality
But I must learn to face what is real
In the cold light of day you were my shelter
I'll find another way to get through
Don't you understand?


Please don't drive away
Leave me here, leave me now
Let your horse be my chariot



You're holding me back so tight
Stop it, just let me go
It's only time that can set us free


I am leaving now
Free at last! I won't see you again
My soul has grown wings
Fly straight up, fly away
Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away! Fly away!

Don't leave me in suspense
Don't you dare turn my world around and end it yet
Open up your heart to me


Feel the spirit move through me
In this sacred space of healing and release
Wide open mind, wide open eyes
You are free to heal


Open wide, breathe deep
Take a long time coming back home
To yourself


We have come so far to learn from those who came before us
Learn how to grow until we too can reach our highest point
When I look at myself today in a mirror
I see all these flaws fading away
And what was once there is now gone


Open wide, breathe deep
Take a long time coming back home
To yourself


Let your hair down, relax and listen
Just be present, feel alive and awake
Give thanks for this precious gift beyond compare
For every breath that you take


It's as simple as breathing
As natural as walking on solid ground
So wide open mind, wide open eyes
You are free to heal

I will rise and overcome
Leave this cage for better


Fight back, fight back
Don't you know I am alive?
Fight back, fight back
Don't you know I am alive?


Rise above the walls of hatred
Learn to feel compassion
Break the chains that bind us
And understand why we must fight


Feel our wrath on your skin
Feel our wrath on your skin
Feel our wrath on your skin
Feel our wrath on your skin


Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?


Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?
Don't you know I am alive?

I'm gonna dig myself a hole, I wanna get away
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Don't try to understand me, it is what it is


Get out of my skin!
Out of my skin!


Keep digging deeper down 'til you reach the center
Put your ear against the walls so that you can hear
And when you listen long enough, all questions are answered
All questions are answered

Please get out of my skin!
Please get out of my skin!

Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate


Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate
Dig in deep and crawl until the light don't penetrate

Why don't you go, go away?
You must leave me alone


I am so tired of seeing you around here
Sickened by your voice all over my chest and neck
Please understand I feel so scared of you now
I just want to stay alive without your presence

Just go! Just go! Just go! Just go!

Why don't you get out of my way?
Get the fuck off of me, yeah, hey


Don't try to fix yourself if you know better
Learn a little bit before you put yourself on display
Get up, move around, do something useful with yourself
Help somebody else instead of bringing pain inside myself


Oh, please understand I feel so scared of you now
Don't you think that I would like to be left alone

Don't even speak my name anymore, or ask why
It is not necessary for me right now
Leave me alone, let me be who I am
And make sure it stays this way

Some songs that I write are meant to uplift, inspire and give strength
But I must come to terms with the fact that there's a price to pay for all of this


You think you can just get up on your high horse when you see fit?
Well, if it feels good enough for you, then I say drink up to your heart's content

I don't wanna hear the words "why" or "why not" in my ears anymore
All I know is these three simple words: "Why should I?" (yeah)

It doesn't matter what you say or do, you will never bring me down
My attention spans are getting shorter; they grow too long in circles 'round your neck
Leave me alone! Leave me alone! Leave me alone!


If I had a dollar for every time somebody told me what to do, I would have five grand now
They call me all kinds of names like dumbass, idiot and moron
But trust me bro, you haven't even scratched the surface yet

The time has come to rise and fight
All these monsters, they must fall
Find a way out of this maze
To the edge that's higher now


Climb all the hills you have to climb
Get over mountains high as heaven
Climb until your skin breaks, bleed
And try, I know you can


I will take you by my hand
Lead you through the fire
Fight for what is right there
Learn from those who came before
Feel your strength is rising
You are getting stronger all the time


We are facing an army of one million
Those that we have to beat in order to survive
One million men are marching down our way
They want to destroy everything we built
Let me explain how this works, son
When we are strong, it makes us invincible
But when we lose ourselves along the way
Then we become vulnerable and weak
They say "Trust no one" and "Don't trust yourself"
Give them power because they rule, tell them why?
If we lose faith, we are dead in the water
So, learn how to swim and don't get bored

Get ready for battle!


Rise up and fight!
Learn how to swim and don't get bored
